message:
feat(runtime): auto-detect native event socket for push mode (ft-1memj.5)

Replace the hardcoded native event toggle with auto-detection:
- Always provide the socket path to RuntimeConfig (env var > config > default)
- Always bind the native event listener when native-wezterm feature is enabled
- Always run polling capture as a safety net alongside native push
- Both sources feed the same ingress channel; cursor dedup handles overlap
- Clear logging on mode transitions ("Switching to native push events",
  "falling back to polling only")
- Remove now-unused spawn_idle_capture_task

No config change required — ft watch auto-binds the native socket and
frankenterm-gui auto-connects when it finds it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
